meta.purpose: Automation small-batch research log for PL Commentary Bank. This file records source-backed findings before any database promotion.
meta.databasePromotionPolicy: Only rows with explicit official/high-trust source support may be promoted to data/database.json. Ambiguous identity, incomplete result context, or inaccessible row-level source data must remain outside confirmed histories. Current-event Numata rows are event results, not prior histories for the same event-relative view.

primarySourcesChecked: Existing data/database.json roster skeleton on main for Lot 51-55 identity targets
HPA 2026 Numata Bench Press D/E result速報 PDF
HPA 2026 Spring Ebetsu Classic Powerlifting result PDF
Existing confirmed database histories for 宝利 桃華 to avoid duplicate work
batchScope.openPrCheck: No open Numata athlete research PRs were found before this batch. Recent merged athlete research included Lot 46-50, so this batch continues with Lot 51-55 and avoids duplicate work.
batchScope.writeScope: Adds an isolated research log only. No app runtime, CSS, print template, A4 layout, data/database.json, or data/research-candidates.json changes.

notPromotedToDatabaseThisRun.reason: This batch intentionally avoids direct data/database.json mutation to keep the change isolated and low-risk. Three prior-history rows are official-source-backed promotion candidates: 後藤 麻衣子, 稲垣 恵, 佐藤 奈緒. 宝利 桃華 already has confirmed database histories, so this batch avoids duplication.
notPromotedToDatabaseThisRun.safeNextStep: Run a dedicated schema-safe database promotion pass for confirmed prior histories from accumulated research-batch logs, then keep current-event results separate from event-relative prior histories.
